info.title: SelectPrism External APIs
info.description: REST API endpoints for external integrations

post.description: Add one or more candidates to the system
Upload and attach a resume file to an existing candidate
Create an assessment for a candidate on a specific job
Create a new interview for a candidate assessment

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing bearer token

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description: Reset and regenerate an existing interview with a new expiry time

get.description: Retrieve detailed results for a completed interview
Retrieve recording URLs and metadata for an interview
Retrieve raw proctoring data including screenshots and monitoring logs

404.description: Interview or proctoring data not found

get.description: Retrieve a list of all job assessments for the authenticated client

200.description: List of job assessments retrieved successfully

post.description: Create a new job assessment with role, skills, and requirements

post.summary: Add candidates to a job assessment
post.description: Add one or more candidates to a specific job assessment
Configure the number and types of questions for a job assessment

post.summary: Configure job assessment questions (without ID in path)
post.description: Configure the number and types of questions for a job assessment using assessmentId in body

get.summary: Get interview statistics for a job assessment
get.description: Retrieve count and statistics of interviews for a specific job assessment

post.description: Obtain an access token using client credentials grant type for API authentication
Generate new OAuth client ID and secret for a user (requires authentication and permissions)
Webhook endpoint to receive search and match processing results

get.description: Retrieve search and match data for a specific candidate assessment

200.description: Search and match data retrieved successfully

invite.description: Whether to send invitation email to candidates

expiresInDays.description: Number of days until assessment invitation expires

candidates.description: Array of candidates to add (1-100 candidates)

candidateId.description: Candidate ID to attach resume to

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

message.example: Unauthorized - invalid or missing authentication token

details.example: Request with this eventId has already been processed

message.example: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

statusCode.description: HTTP status code for accepted requests

eventId.description: Client-provided event ID for duplicate prevention

externalCandidateAssessmentId.description: Candidate Assessment ID for which interview is to be created

expiryInSeconds.description: Expiry time for the interview in seconds

interviewId.description: Interview ID which needs to be reset

expiryInSeconds.description: New expiry time for the interview in seconds

interviewLink.description: Link the candidate uses to start the interview

expiryDate.description: Date-time after which the interview link expires

candidateAssessmentId.description: Present when the candidate assessment record was found

previousInterviewId.description: Interview ID that was reset and replaced

interviewLink.description: New interview link for the candidate

expiryDate.description: Expiry date of the new interview link

interviewId.description: ID of the interview that failed to reset

description.example: We are looking for an experienced backend developer...

codingQuestionsTimeLimit.description: Time limit per coding question in minutes

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was generated

LegacyWebhookEnvelope.description: Top-level envelope for legacy webhook events. Note: does NOT include id, clientId, environment, version, or meta.

interviewLink.description: URL the candidate uses to start the interview

expiryDate.description: Date-time when the interview link expires

interviewReportId.description: ID of the generated interview report

interviewId.description: Interview ID for which proctoring data was generated

grant_type.description: OAuth 2.0 grant type (only client_credentials is supported)

client_id.description: OAuth client ID provided by Prism

client_secret.description: OAuth client secret provided by Prism

access_token.description: JWT access token for API authentication

userId.description: User ID for which to generate credentials

clientId.description: Optional client ID to associate with credentials

matchScore.description: Numerical match score between candidate and job assessment (0–100)

pii_info.description: Personally Identifiable Information extracted from document

WebhookStatus.description: Outcome status of the webhook event

WebhookEntityType.description: The type of entity the event relates to

WebhookSourceService.description: Internal service that generated the webhook

pfTransactionId.description: ULID transaction ID; matches the root envelope pfTransactionId

candidateAssessmentId.description: Present on interview and candidate-assessment events

statusCode.description: HTTP-equivalent status code for the operation

entityId.description: Internal Prism ID of the affected entity

code.description: Application-level error code (present on failure events only)

id.description: Unique event ID with evt_ prefix

eventType.description: Webhook event name (see individual event schemas)

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was generated

WebhookEnvelope.description: Top-level payload POSTed to the client webhook URL. The data array always contains exactly one event body.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token for external API authentication (most common)

apiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
apiKeyAuth.description: API key for internal service-to-service communication
